faults.description: Hard-kill the service (docker compose kill). Node disappears until restarted.
Restart the service (docker compose restart). Node replays WAL on startup.
Freeze the container (docker compose pause). Node stops responding but is not crashed.
Unfreeze a paused container (docker compose unpause).
Disconnect node from the bridge network (docker network disconnect). Real network isolation.
Reconnect an isolated node (docker network connect).
Add artificial response delay via POST /admin/inject_delay. Simulates a slow or overloaded node.
Append malformed JSON to the node's WAL on the host mount. Tests WAL hardening at startup.
